name: Cursed Eldritch Clothes~
description:
Be mindful of what you wear~


You've just bought a charming new one-piece outfit that fits you perfectly! Despite its strange color, you rush home to try it on... But was that really the right thing to do?

Even though it's a one-piece outfit, it's totally adaptable to all body types, both female and male, with the appropriate effects, try them all :3

Choose your setup between Fantasy, Modern, and Sci-Fi in the first message!

Tags: Impregnation, (Breast) Expansion, Cumflation, Public

-Feedbacks are much appreciated!-
creator: guiltyskull
